configuration_hash: BARI_RECAL_P0=on; engine=proto_v0 engine-baseline-2026-06-04+TASK-216; bsip1_schema=bsip1_v0_1; data-only remediation (no engine/cap/veto change)
scope: Red-team v4 in-lane data corrections: corpus-wide 0.5g trans-declaration artifact guard (RT-2), beet-cracker NOVA/ingredient reconciliation (RT-7), implausible per-100g kcal/fiber basis errors (RT-5/RT-6). No scoring-engine, cap, or veto change.
authoritative_source_reprobe: C:\Bari\02_products\salty_snacks\bsip0_outputs\off_reprobe_task234.json (OFF serving-level re-fetch by EAN: trans-fat_serving, energy-kcal_serving/100g, fiber, used to confirm the declaration artifact + basis errors)

trans_artifact_neutralized.rule: OFF trans-fat_serving=0.5g (or sub-1g token) is the Israeli '<1g' threshold DECLARATION, not a measured value; scaled by serving fraction it yields phantom per-100g trans. Neutralize fat_trans_g -> 0.0 where the value traces to such a declaration AND no PHVO/hydrogenated-oil marker is present (or ingredients absent).
trans_artifact_neutralized.phvo_guard_confirmed: Only product with a real PHVO marker (שמן צמחי מוקשה) is קליק כריות נוגט 7290116537375, which carries trans=None and is NOT in this set; correctly untouched.
trans_artifact_neutralized.score_changes: Only the two non-exact-0.5 artifacts moved (Bamba +1.6, Apropo Italiano +1.2); the exact-0.5 set was already engine-neutralized, so 0 score change there (data made honest).

fiber_single_field_omission.name: קליק קורנפלקס
fiber_single_field_omission.reason: fiber 38g impossible: fiber(38)+sugars(29.6)=67.6 > total carbohydrates(66.15); fiber is a subset of carbs. Rest of panel plausible -> omit fiber only, keep product.
fiber_single_field_omission.note: Score dropped because the product was previously gaining a satiety/nutrient-density benefit from fabricated fiber; removal is the correct de-inflation.

basis_error_excluded.rule: Whole-panel per-serving values mislabeled per-100g (Atwater(macros) reproduces stated kcal; real fried/baked potato crisp ~450-540 kcal/100g). OFF carries no serving_size to recover the scale factor -> per-100g basis UNRECOVERABLE -> drop from scored shelf (every macro is on the wrong basis; not a single-field omission).

rt7_nova_reconciliation.rule: BSIP1 stored nova_proxy = raw OFF nova_group (often 4) while the engine independently infers + publishes its own NOVA (the value that scores). Reconciled BSIP1 nova_proxy to the engine-inferred value; raw OFF preserved as nova_group_off_raw (provenance). Build now publishes novaGroup only when ingredientCount>0 (else null + nova_suppressed_reason), so novaGroup/ingredientCount/ingredients are internally consistent. Score-neutral (engine NOVA was already the published value).

grade_distribution.delta_note: 41 -> 38 (3 basis-error chips dropped: one was B, one was B, one was C). Remaining grade moves are within-grade (Bamba/Apropo Italiano gained points but did not cross a boundary; Click 25/E -> 14/E stays E).
